name: io.github.beckettlab/beckett-godot-mcp
title: Beckett - MCP for Godot
description: MCP server embedded in the Godot 4 editor; drive Godot with AI, zero sidecar.

io.modelcontextprotocol.registry/publish.distribution: Godot editor addon (enable in Project > Plugins). No npm/pypi/docker package; no stdio binary.

runtime.note: Local-only HTTP server (Godot TCPServer); port configurable. Not a publicly reachable remote, so intentionally not listed under 'remotes'.

editions.lite: Free MIT - github.com/beckettlab/beckett-godot-mcp + Godot Asset Library
